query:
INSERT INTO aircraft (tail_number, model, manufacturer, specs) VALUES
('N737DL', 'Boeing 737-800', 'Boeing', JSON_OBJECT(
  'hydraulic_pressure_min', 2800,
  'hydraulic_pressure_max', 3200,
  'hydraulic_pressure_unit', 'PSI',
  'fuel_min_pct', 15,
  'fuel_max_pct', 100,
  'fuel_capacity_lbs', 46000,
  'nose_tire_pressure_min', 175,
  'nose_tire_pressure_max', 200,
  'nose_tire_pressure_unit', 'PSI',
  'main_tire_pressure_min', 195,
  'main_tire_pressure_max', 215,
  'main_tire_pressure_unit', 'PSI',
  'engine_oil_min_qt', 6,
  'engine_oil_max_qt', 22,
  'engine_oil_unit', 'QT',
  'brake_temp_max_c', 150,
  'brake_temp_unit', 'C',
  'apu_oil_min_qt', 1,
  'apu_oil_max_qt', 3
)),
('N320UA', 'Airbus A320-200', 'Airbus', JSON_OBJECT(
  'hydraulic_pressure_min', 2900,
  'hydraulic_pressure_max', 3100,
  'hydraulic_pressure_unit', 'PSI',
  'fuel_min_pct', 10,
  'fuel_max_pct', 100,
  'fuel_capacity_lbs', 42000,
  'nose_tire_pressure_min', 165,
  'nose_tire_pressure_max', 185,
  'nose_tire_pressure_unit', 'PSI',
  'main_tire_pressure_min', 200,
  'main_tire_pressure_max', 220,
  'main_tire_pressure_unit', 'PSI',
  'engine_oil_min_qt', 5,
  'engine_oil_max_qt', 20,
  'engine_oil_unit', 'QT',
  'brake_temp_max_c', 140,
  'brake_temp_unit', 'C',
  'apu_oil_min_qt', 1,
  'apu_oil_max_qt', 2.5
));
